TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kenuy, title = Kenuy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kenuy} }

S.FORM: alang Kenuy ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,351 buwan, 5,974 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 597 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 5,377 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 7%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kenuy hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kenuy hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kenuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kenuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kenuy hya' ga Lasutan. tay mkyahu' na Kenuy hya' ga Cipawkan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kenuy ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,351 buwan, 5,974 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 597 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 5,377 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 7%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kenuy hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kenuy hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kenuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kenuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kenuy hya' ga Lasutan. tay mkyahu' na Kenuy hya' ga Cipawkan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kenuj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, truku *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kenuj ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na kenuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na kenuj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kenuj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kenuj ħjaʔ ɣa las~ɕutan. taj mkjaħuʔ na kenuj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨipawkan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
